hero.subheading: It watches the openings at the companies you pick, reviews your résumé and sends you a tailored CV for each one — all in a chat.

howItWorksNew.headline: From "hi" to the right role, in 4 steps
howItWorksNew.step1Title: Create your account and connect WhatsApp
howItWorksNew.step2Title: Pick the companies you want to watch
howItWorksNew.step3Title: Norte flags new openings for you
howItWorksNew.step4Title: Ask for analysis and a tailored CV in the chat

ats.heading: Find out why your CV gets discarded — before you send it
ats.sub: The AI compares your resume with the job and shows exactly what's missing to pass the filter.

pdf.heading: A resume optimized for every job
pdf.sub: Generate a PDF tuned to the job's keywords in one click.

norteDoes.title: What Norte does for you
norteDoes.alertTitle: Flags new openings before everyone else
norteDoes.alertBody: Straight from the companies' own career pages, not an aggregator. You only get what fits your field — no daily digging.
norteDoes.matchTitle: Shows why your résumé gets dropped
norteDoes.matchBody: The AI compares your résumé to the role and reveals the match, what you already have and what's missing to clear the ATS filter — before you apply.
norteDoes.pdfTitle: Rewrites your CV for each role
norteDoes.pdfBody: A tailored PDF with the role's right keywords — without rewriting anything from scratch. Just ask in the chat.

multicanal.title: Whatever channel you prefer
multicanal.subtitle: WhatsApp is the fastest way to talk to Norte — but it's not the only one.
multicanal.whatsappBody: Chat, get openings and request your CV — on the app you already use.
multicanal.emailBody: Rather not use WhatsApp? Norte sends the openings digest by email.
multicanal.webBody: Full control: history, résumés and settings in one place.

items.a: It's an AI assistant — but built to talk like a person and actually get things done. Whenever you want, or if it gets stuck, a real human takes over.

items.q: Do you have my number? Is it safe?
items.a: We only use your WhatsApp to send openings and talk about your search. No spam, you can opt out anytime, and we follow Brazil's LGPD.

items.q: What if I don't use WhatsApp?
items.a: No problem. Norte also works over email, and the web dashboard has everything.

items.q: Are the jobs real? Where do they come from?
items.a: Yes. We pull straight from the companies' own career pages, several times a day. No aggregator — the opening shows up as soon as it's posted.
Yes. No lock-in — cancel whenever you want from the dashboard.

footer.disclaimer: The brands, logos, and company names displayed belong to their respective owners and are used for identification purposes only. ScrapJobs has no affiliation, sponsorship, or endorsement from these companies.

ctaFinal.title: Let Norte run the search
ctaFinal.subtitle: While you get on with life, it watches the openings and prepares your CV.

pricing.title: Start free today
pricing.subtitle: 7-day trial, no card. Cancel anytime.
pricing.savingsAnchor: Save up to {{hours}} hours of tedious job searching per month
pricing.guarantee: Cancel anytime. No lock-in, no fine print.

lgpd.encryption: Your data is protected with end-to-end encryption

stats.trustLine: Real data from our platform, updated in real time

ats.body1: Upload your current resume. In seconds, our AI cross-references your profile with the job and delivers a complete diagnosis: ATS score, missing keywords, and gaps that are sabotaging your applications.
ats.body2Bold: Now you know exactly what to fix.
ats.finalText: Focus on aligning your experience with payment and fintech keywords, and highlighting technical leadership.
ats.gap1Desc: Payment cycles and fintech are critical for this role.
ats.gap1Title: Missing experience with payment systems and authorization.
ats.gap2Desc: Fundamental requirement for the senior position.
ats.gap2Title: No evidence of technical leadership and mentoring.
ats.headline: Find out why you're
ats.scoreSummary: The candidate demonstrates strong backend experience with Java and Spring Boot, but lacks details in payments and technical leadership.
ats.strength1Desc: Foundation for the job's architecture, including scalable distributed systems.
ats.strength1Title: Experience with microservices using Java and Spring Boot
ats.strength2Desc: Important for high availability and secure deployment pipelines.
ats.strength2Title: Hands-on knowledge of Kubernetes and CI/CD
ats.suggestion1Example: Software Developer focused on backend and cloud environments, with experience in Java Spring Boot microservices...
ats.suggestion1Text: Include payment and technical leadership keywords.

pdf.body1: The AI takes the gaps, suggests the right keywords, and rebuilds your sentences to pass the ATS filter. You choose what to apply and download the PDF — ready to send.
pdf.body2Bold: One click between you and the perfect application.
pdf.emailHint: Or send the full analysis by email
pdf.headline: A perfect resume
